privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated EMR data for a fictional patient ('John Smith', DOB '1965-08-22', Male, encounter date '2024-05-14'). The required vitals extraction and unit conversion exactly match the prompt instructions and the synthetic source text: Heart Rate 82, Blood Pressure 145/92, Height 177.8 cm (converted from 70 inches), and Weight 88.5 kg (converted from 195 lbs). The target study ('CV-REG-2023') and subject ('CV-106') are also explicitly enforced via OpenClinica SQL setup queries.
